label: Station Closure Policy

closure_types.label: Temporary station closure
closure_types.condition: A station is temporarily closed due to maintenance, crowd control, safety inspection, or local disruption.
closure_types.passenger_guidance: Passengers should use the nearest available alternative station or follow staff instructions for replacement transport.
closure_types.ticket_validity: Valid tickets remain accepted for the affected journey on reasonable alternative routes within the same network on the same travel date.

closure_types.label: Full-day station closure
closure_types.condition: A station is closed for the entire service day due to planned engineering work or an emergency incident.
closure_types.passenger_guidance: Passengers should use published alternative stations, replacement bus stops, or customer service instructions.
closure_types.ticket_validity: Passengers may use the same ticket on approved alternative routes or request a refund if the journey cannot reasonably be completed.

refund_policy: If the station closure prevents the passenger from completing the intended journey and no reasonable alternative transport is provided, the passenger may request a full refund for the unused journey.
notes: Station closure compensation does not apply when the passenger chooses not to travel despite an available reasonable alternative route.

label: Replacement Bus Service Policy

replacement_bus_rules.condition: Rail or metro service is suspended on part of the route and a replacement bus service is provided.
replacement_bus_rules.ticket_validity: Existing tickets for the affected journey are accepted on the replacement bus without an additional fare.
replacement_bus_rules.boarding_rule: Passengers should board replacement buses at designated stops announced by staff, station signs, or the TransitFlow service notice.

replacement_bus_rules.condition: The replacement bus significantly increases the expected journey time by 60 minutes or more.
replacement_bus_rules.compensation: Passengers may request delay compensation according to the delay compensation policy if the delay was caused by operator fault.
replacement_bus_rules.how_to_claim: Submit a claim via the app or customer service within 28 days of the travel date.

accessibility: Replacement buses may have limited wheelchair capacity. Passengers requiring step-free access should contact station staff or customer service for an accessible alternative.
notes: Replacement bus services are intended to complete the original journey, not to provide unlimited travel outside the affected route.

label: Severe Service Disruption Refund Policy

severe_disruption_rules.condition: A journey cannot be completed because services are suspended and no reasonable alternative transport is available.
severe_disruption_rules.refund: 100% refund of the unused journey fare.
severe_disruption_rules.how_to_claim: Submit the booking reference and disruption details via the app or customer service within 28 days of the travel date.

severe_disruption_rules.condition: A passenger abandons the journey after starting travel because the remaining service is suspended.
severe_disruption_rules.refund: Refund is calculated for the unused portion of the journey where the passenger could not reasonably continue.
severe_disruption_rules.how_to_claim: Submit claim evidence, including booking reference and affected station or route, within 28 days of travel.

severe_disruption_rules.condition: The disruption is caused by extreme weather, security incidents, government directives, or passenger-caused incidents.
severe_disruption_rules.refund: Refund eligibility is reviewed case by case. Delay compensation may be excluded when the cause is outside operator control.
severe_disruption_rules.how_to_claim: Contact customer service with travel details and supporting evidence.

notes: This policy is separate from normal voluntary cancellation rules. It applies when the operator cannot provide the booked transport service as planned.

label: Alternative Transport Reimbursement Policy

reimbursement_rules.condition: The operator announces that passengers may arrange their own alternative transport due to severe service disruption.
reimbursement_rules.reimbursement: Reasonable alternative transport costs may be reimbursed up to USD 10.00 per passenger.
reimbursement_rules.required_evidence: Original receipt, booking reference, affected route, and travel date.

reimbursement_rules.condition: A passenger arranges alternative transport without operator instruction while replacement transport is available.
reimbursement_rules.reimbursement: Alternative transport costs are normally not reimbursed.
reimbursement_rules.required_evidence: Customer service may review exceptional circumstances case by case.

notes: Alternative transport reimbursement does not replace the normal ticket refund process. A passenger may be eligible for either refund, reimbursement, or both depending on the disruption case.
